debug_info.goal:
case inr
Hist : History
L R : List Formula
nlf : NegLoadFormula
tab : Tableau Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))
s : PathIn tab.flip
s_in :
  s ∈
    if (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))).isLoaded = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 (List.map Sequent.flip Hist) (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)))
        (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) tab.flip (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))) lt
                (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x fun Y Y_in =>
                List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in)
                  (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next =>
        List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]
⊢ ⋯ ▸ s.flip ∈
    if Sequent.isLoaded (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) tab (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) lt (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x
                fun Y Y_in => List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in) (exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next => List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]

failed_attempts:
case loc nrep nbas lt next =>
      simp_all [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_flatMap, List.mem_attach, List.mem_map,
        true_and, Subtype.exists, Sum.swap_inl]
      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, rfl, Y_in⟩
      rcases Y.O with (_ | nlf_Y)
      · simp_all [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded, PathIn.flip]
        exact ⟨Y, Y_in, .nil, by simp [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded], by simp [PathIn.flip]⟩
      · rcases nlf_Y with (nlfY | nlfY)
        · exact ⟨Y, Y_in, PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, by simp [PathIn.flip]⟩
        · exact ⟨Y, Y_in, PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, by simp [PathIn.flip]⟩
    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>
      simp_all [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_map, Sum.swap_inl]
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases Y.O with (_ | nlf_Y)
      · simp_all [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded, PathIn.flip]
      · rcases nlf_Y with (nlfY | nlfY)
        · exact ⟨PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, by simp [PathIn.flip]⟩
        · exact ⟨PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, by simp [PathIn.flip]⟩
    case lrep =>
      simp_all [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Tableau.flip]

case lrep hrep => simp_all [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded, Tableau.flip, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip]
    case loc nrep nbas lt next ih =>
      simp_all [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded, Tableau.flip, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, List.mem_flatMap, List.mem_map, List.mem_attach]
      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, rfl, Y_in⟩
      use ⟨Y, Y_in⟩; simp; use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip), ih Y Y_in e e_in
      simp [PathIn.flip]
    case pdl Y nbas r nrep next ih =>
      simp_all [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded, Tableau.flip, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, List.mem_map]
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, rfl⟩
      use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip), ih e e_in
      simp [PathIn.flip]

cases tab
    case loc nbas lt nrep next =>

      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, rfl, Y_in⟩
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · sorry
      · rcases lr_nlf_Y with (nlfY|nlfY)
        · have IH := mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in
          refine ⟨⟨Y, Y_in⟩, ?_⟩

    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>

      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (none|some nlfY)⟩
      · simp_all [exitsOf, PathIn.flip]
      · simp_all [exitsOf, List.mem_map]; exact ⟨_, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, by simp [PathIn.flip]⟩

case loc nbas lt nrep next =>
      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, rfl, Y_in⟩
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · simp_all [exitsOf]; exact ⟨⟨Y, Y_in⟩, by simp, .nil, by simp [exitsOf], rfl⟩
      · exact ⟨⟨Y, Y_in⟩, by simp, _, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, rfl⟩
    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · simp_all [exitsOf]
      · rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨_, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, rfl⟩

case loc nrep nbas lt next =>
      simp [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Tableau.flip, Sequent.isLoaded, List.mem_flatMap, List.mem_attach, List.mem_map] at *
      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, rfl, Y_in⟩
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, _|OY⟩
      · simp [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded] at e_in; subst e_in
        exact ⟨Y, Y_in, .nil, by simp [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded], rfl⟩
      · exact ⟨Y, Y_in, _, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, rfl⟩
    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>
      simp [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Tableau.flip, Sequent.isLoaded, List.mem_map] at *
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, _|OY⟩
      · simp [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded] at e_in; subst e_in
        exact ⟨.nil, by simp [exitsOf, Sequent.isLoaded], rfl⟩
      · exact ⟨_, mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, rfl⟩
    case lrep =>
      simp [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] at *
      simp_all [Tableau.flip]

sorry
      · rcases lr_nlf_Y with (nlfY|nlfY)
        · simp [Sequent.flip] at *; unfold Sequent.flip at e e_in; simp at e e_in; unfold Olf.flip at e e_in; simp at e e_in
          have := endNodesOf_flip Yf_in; simp only [Sequent.flip_flip] at this
          refine ⟨(LY, RY, some _), this, ?_⟩
          use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip)
          constructor
          · have IH := mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in; grind
          · sorry
        · sorry
    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>
      simp_all only [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_map, Sum.swap_inl]
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, def_s⟩; subst def_s
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · unfold exitsOf at ⊢ e_in; simp [Sequent.isLoaded] at *; subst e_in; sorry
      · have IH := mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in
        use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip), IH; simp; sorry
    case lrep =>
      simp [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] at *; simp_all [Tableau.flip]

cases tab
    case lrep =>
      simp [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] at *; simp_all [Tableau.flip]
    case pdl Y nrep bas r next =>
      simp_all only [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_map, Sum.swap_inl]
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, def_s⟩
      subst def_s
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · unfold exitsOf at ⊢ e_in; simp [Sequent.isLoaded] at *; subst e_in; sorry
      · exact ⟨(PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip), mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, by simp; sorry⟩
    case loc nrep nbas lt next =>
      simp_all only [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_flatMap, List.mem_attach, List.mem_map,
        true_and, Subtype.exists, Sum.swap_inl]
      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, def_s⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, def_Yf, Y_in⟩
      subst def_Yf def_s
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · simp [Sequent.flip] at *; simp_all [Sequent.isLoaded, exitsOf, PathIn.flip]; sorry
      · have := endNodesOf_flip Yf_in
        simp only [Sequent.flip_flip] at this
        exact ⟨Y, this, (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip), mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, by sorry⟩

sorry
      · rcases lr_nlf_Y with (nlfY|nlfY)
        · simp [Sequent.flip] at *
          have := endNodesOf_flip Yf_in
          simp only [Sequent.flip_flip] at this
          refine ⟨(LY, RY, some _), this, ?_⟩
          use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip)
          constructor
          · have IH := mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in
            grind
          · sorry
        · sorry
    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>
      simp_all only [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_map, Sum.swap_inl]
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, def_s⟩
      subst def_s
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · unfold exitsOf at ⊢ e_in
        simp [Sequent.isLoaded] at *
        subst e_in
        sorry
      · have IH := mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in
        use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip), IH
        grind
    case lrep =>
      simp [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] at *
      simp_all [Tableau.flip]

case loc nbas lt nrep next =>
      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, rfl⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, rfl, Y_in⟩
      refine ⟨⟨Y, Y_in⟩, trivial, ⟨PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip, ⟨mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, ?_⟩⟩⟩
      simp [PathIn.flip]
    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip, ⟨mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in, ?_⟩⟩
      simp [PathIn.flip]

sorry
    case lrep =>
      simp [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] at *
      simp_all [Tableau.flip]
